name: HR tuition reimbursement policy example
answer:
Employees can request tuition reimbursement for approved courses up to $5,000 per calendar year.
Employees have 90 days after course completion to submit reimbursement requests.
The company provides free tutoring for every course.

sources.title: HR Tuition Reimbursement Policy
sources.content:
Employees can request tuition reimbursement for manager-approved courses up to $5,000 per calendar year.
Reimbursement requests must be submitted within 30 days after course completion.
The policy does not cover degree programs without prior manager approval.
